steps.t: The white stag can be found in the south-western Wildwood. Linnet has asked you to defeat Gwengorn the white stag.
Gwengorn has fled into the hills of the southern Wildwood. You should pursue Gwengorn.
Gwengorn has led you to a sprung trap in the southern Wildwood. You should examine the trap.
Linnet is located in the south-central Wildwood. You should talk to Linnet Redholm.
